response.justification: While Bogdan is a highly experienced staff-level software engineer with strong full-stack and distributed systems skills, he lacks the specialized hardware and AI infrastructure background required for this role. The position demands deep expertise in SoC/IP modeling, GPU/SIMD architectures, and deep-learning workload optimization for hardware accelerators, none of which are present in his resume.
strengths: Meets the baseline experience requirement with over 15 years in software engineering and a BS in Computer Science.
Demonstrated ability in low-latency software performance optimization using C/C++ and DLang.
Proven track record of technical leadership and architectural design in complex distributed systems.
concerns: Complete lack of experience in SoC and IP modeling, a core requirement for this position.
No background in hardware-software co-design for AI accelerators, GPUs, or SIMD/MIMD architectures.
Missing required expertise in deep-learning workload analysis and neural network training/inference optimization.
